assertions.assertion: Includes an ITestClaimsProvider (or equivalent) interface that allows setting claims per-test
assertions.rationale: Uses a static property TestClaims instead of an ITestClaimsProvider interface — no DI-based abstraction, static state is problematic for parallel tests

assertions.assertion: The WebApplicationFactory registers the test auth scheme via AddAuthentication and AddScheme
Shows a test that calls ClearClaims (or equivalent) and asserts 401 Unauthorized
assertions.rationale: Sets TestClaims = null and asserts Unauthorized, though uses AuthenticateResult.Fail instead of NoResult

assertions.assertion: Does NOT disable authorization entirely — authorization policies remain active
assertions.rationale: Only authentication is replaced; authorization middleware is not removed
